e2ee/aead

      • keyPairFromPassword(password: string; salt: RandomBytes): (Key32, Key32)
        seal
      • seal(plainText: string; key: Key32): SealedMessage
        sharedSecret
      • sharedSecret(mySecret: Key32; theirPublic: Key32): Key32
        unseal
      • unseal(msg: SealedMessage; key: Key32): string
        verifyChallengeMac
      • verifyChallengeMac(secret: Key32; challenge: Mac16; received: Mac16): bool
        x25519KeyPair
      • x25519KeyPair(secret: Key32): (Key32, Key32)

This module provides a simple interface for encrypting and decrypting messages using a shared secret key derived from a password or generated through X25519 key exchange. It also includes functions for sealing and unsealing messages, as well as computing and verifying challenge-response MACs for mutual authentication

Imports

private/monocypher, private/utils, password

Types

AeadStream = object
The AeadStream type represents an AEAD streaming encryption context for 
AeadStreamMode = enum
  aeadX, aeadDjb, aeadIetf
The mode of AEAD streaming to use. Each mode corresponds to a different nonce size and initialization function 
SealedMessage = object
  nonce*: Nonce24
  mac*: Mac16
  cipherText*: seq[uint8]

Procs

proc aeadStreamInit(mode: AeadStreamMode; key: Key32; nonce: openArray[uint8]): AeadStream {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc aeadStreamRead(stream: var AeadStream; cipherText: openArray[uint8];
                    mac: Mac16; ad: openArray[uint8] = []): seq[uint8] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc aeadStreamWrite(stream: var AeadStream; plainText: openArray[uint8];
                     ad: openArray[uint8] = []): (seq[uint8], Mac16) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc computeChallengeMac(secret: Key32; challenge: Mac16): Mac16 {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute a MAC for the given challenge using the shared secret. Returns the MAC 
proc decrypt(cipherText: seq[uint8]; mac: RandomBytes; key: array[32, uint8];
             nonce: array[24, uint8]): string {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Decrypts the given cipherText using the provided key and nonce. Returns the decrypted plainText as a string.

This uses crypto_aead_unlock to decrypt and verify the MAC. If decryption fails or if the MAC verification fails, it raises an exception

proc encrypt(text: string; key: array[32, uint8]; nonce: array[24, uint8]): (
    seq[uint8], RandomBytes) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Encrypts the given plainText using the provided key and nonce. Returns a tuple of (cipherText, mac).

This is using the crypto_aead_lock that encrypts and authenticates a plaintext. It can be decrypted using decrypt which uses crypto_aead_unlock. The MAC is generated as part of the encryption process and is required for decryption

proc encrypt(text: string; key: string; nonce: string): (seq[uint8], RandomBytes) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Encrypts the given plainText using the provided key and nonce as hex strings. Returns a tuple of (cipherText, mac).

This is using the crypto_aead_lock that encrypts and authenticates a plaintext. It can be decrypted using decrypt which uses crypto_aead_unlock. The MAC is generated as part of the encryption process and is required for decryption

proc keyPairFromPassword(password: string; salt: RandomBytes): (Key32, Key32) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Derive a key pair from a password and salt. Returns (secret, publicKey) 
proc seal(plainText: string; key: Key32): SealedMessage {.
    ...raises: [OSError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Encrypts the plainText using the provided key and a random nonce 
proc sharedSecret(mySecret: Key32; theirPublic: Key32): Key32 {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute the shared secret using X25519. Returns the shared secret 
proc unseal(msg: SealedMessage; key: Key32): string {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Decrypts the sealed message using the provided key. Returns the decrypted plainText 
proc verifyChallengeMac(secret: Key32; challenge: Mac16; received: Mac16): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Verify the received MAC against the expected MAC computed from the secret and challenge. Returns true if valid, false otherwise 
proc x25519KeyPair(secret: Key32): (Key32, Key32) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Generate X25519 key pair from secret. Returns (secret, publicKey)
